name: Susan Wild
subject: Glad to have you on board
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25)
---
| As a supporter of Democratic causes, we wanted to alert you about this important race. Democrat Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress, a battleground district that could determine control of the House of Representatives. We need you on board to keep Susan's seat blue in 2022. However, if you no longer wish to receive updates from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/hCQ7hVFOzfO7Im4CNVz4fQB0rs8iay7zQXNeJ9rsFcg=) at any time.
* * *
Hi Peter,

I'm excited to have you on the team. I'm Susan Wild and I represent Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress.

In 2018, I won a fiercely competitive campaign to become the first woman ever to represent the Lehigh Valley in Congress, and the Jewish member of Congress from Pennsylvania--and I did it without taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which I've continued to reject since.

**[My philosophy is simple: getting things done in Washington takes hard work, it requires listening to my constituents, and it demands working with those on the other side of the aisle.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25)**

**[In the face of the COVID-19 pandemic](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25)** , I have spent every day fighting to protect our frontline workers, provide support to workers and small businesses, and get older Americans and vulnerable communities the care they need.

**[I believe health care is a right, not a privilege.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25)** In Congress, I have helped lead the effort to protect healthcare for people with pre-existing conditions and lower the cost of prescription drugs.

**[Climate change is the existential threat of our time.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25)** From my first day in Congress, I have been a champion for our environment, co-chairing the New Democrat Coalition's Climate Change Task Force and working to pass climate protections.

**[The future of our economy depends on affordable and accessible education.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25)** I am a member of the House Education and Labor Committee, where I work every day to address the student loan crisis crippling the next generation of Americans and make sure that our K-12 public schools have the resources they need.

In 2020, I won re-election in an incredibly close election, despite national Republicans targeting me with outside money.

Now Republicans are desperate to win this seat back and win back the House. Kevin McCarthy is telling his supporters that Republicans are guaranteed to flip seats like ours and take back the House in 2022.

We can win again and keep this seat blue, but I'm going to need you on board every step of the way. **[Please follow me on Facebook or Twitter to stay updated with our campaign, or consider making a contribution to help us win:](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25)**
---
| [FOLLOW ON FACEBOOK ](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/-VvpWGp_jliFgFB3CMT4QXgCdBuYxr2BLNeph4GVx78=)

I'm grateful to have you on our team. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25) Susan Wild

Susan Wild for Congress
1636 N. Cedar Crest Blvd
#183
Allentown PA 18104 United States
Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy -- not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. But she needs your support today -- her campaign runs on grassroots donations since she's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. **_[If you can, consider giving anything you can to her campaign today.>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/XwTWU5hsFKFpH7uEFwRgy3z1dt6WFgvcZG0I-Vq-3Rs=/vY-jrmHlGhHoas3yfM3ZufIqCwfqac-jtIo3HehFP6Q=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-1&amount=25)_**

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: we've got big plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

The work for 2022 begins now. If we want to make serious progress towards a Blue West Virginia, we can’t wait until right before the election. The Republican Party is fracturing and imploding right now. Half of the party is pulling towards radicalized extremism, emboldened by Trump – and the other half is trying to distance itself. This is an opportunity. This is our moment.
Will you help us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
The WVDP has plans to implement the most aggressive and coordinated Democratic effort our state has ever seen. From rigorous candidate training and recruitment, to mobilizing volunteers and registering new voters – we’ve got big plans.
Will you make a donation right now, and help us raise the resources we need? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/belinda.jpg]

name: Team NHGOP
subject: Op-Ed: "In supporting Thomas, Hassan has chosenpoorly"
body:
Read this latest piece about Maggie Hassan and Wendy Thomas

[](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0SwcUhno1XrCiXXuOQrcPZz4ExT2bWfCvAeigCCc9A7KuYaI498X469-2FGoDAxI02SFf4UCCjpZoYbxw0FRMIKq1PXdVTxYYIlOOLTR3dRowCrp7bzSOhoucrGAJVnoDBX3nGNSF4s4U1Yrb8SJLwrNcsnvOPcv4ONAx1agsXDeVwl6ngWQ6Eq-2BVqn1A1O-2Fsvcy-2FWKynutv0cl8-2FbeHTOG8sc-3Dqv2h_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgzzRhEeBCxzfLf2ZzOEJ6KG70kf-2B7fgkQ-2Brpwwq1Oa077cbGbXketR9057WP932xujUN8MKBeL-2BCufrP3y7UDmu74Nz2E88edxTIEmf0HnA9l1waAJGi8WdDofgbSN6Ow7FiuqYkuf-2BmHEd-2BkXVXie4pCT33DsFv-2BosfDGzTy8Y8thzLGCHLUPDf6LzxmrVWZIiV9NZ-2Fkz-2Bfyq-2FJ-2BZL7RwE1J-2BrSKQ2kFlZNoKnM-2Bm-2F-2F44yf0Gra2LO8j-2Ff-2BuqGofJr59FlMEO2pzzkM7Wigddi-2Bfgh6f0-2ByP8JxInyKEcy5bRtFxkyzq-2FkV-2FwQit0gu6HKv1GD-2FhKlu0Q-2F-2BDsOHRiy89-2FfVlRRQ4u8ud-2BrJ8MnjmBXwfW3z4gdz28Ne39ahybX7mJ4Ry2SB91DZIdtw-2BemgYu-2FXjTfTpF8nqNDxjppg-3D-3D) [](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0SwcUhno1XrCiXXuOQrcPZz4ExT2bWfCvAeigCCc9A7KuYaI498X469-2FGoDAxI02SFf4UCCjpZoYbxw0FRMIKq1PXdVTxYYIlOOLTR3dRowCrp7bzSOhoucrGAJVnoDBX3nGNSF4s4U1Yrb8SJLwrNcsnvOPcv4ONAx1agsXDeVwl6ngWQ6Eq-2BVqn1A1O-2Fsvcy-2FWKynutv0cl8-2FbeHTOG8sc-3DADzJ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgzzRhEeBCxzfLf2ZzOEJ6KG70kf-2B7fgkQ-2Brpwwq1Oa077cbGbXketR9057WP932xujUN8MKBeL-2BCufrP3y7UDmu74Nz2E88edxTIEmf0HnA9l1waAJGi8WdDofgbSN6Ow7FiuqYkuf-2BmHEd-2BkXVXie4pCT33DsFv-2BosfDGzTy8Y8thzLGCHLUPDf6LzxmrVWZIiV9NZ-2Fkz-2Bfyq-2FJ-2BZL7RwE1J-2BrSKQ2kFlZNoKnM-2Bm-2Fx0Z7VpazcydmWE-2B3SFCmJsFT8J2n7W6bmd0u5ZzdJkrxTISevQ8Xzh1aKTu8HpWnzmzlKJV4gZoxd6WgHtMMNR-2FB36c9NwbOcPrYdjs0AqiWoftZY5GT5qK5v7xvs4hKKnbQ71KIfas32s6GRY8ZwsQQllBcXwrAH8h-2FplFJKcd6bLwobHpDKew4bVS6oM-2BXQ-3D-3D) **SELECTED EXCERPTS:** _"The self-centered actions of Thomas exhibit grandstanding and egotism, not patriotism. I highly doubt that she has served to defend our country or lost a family member who gave his or her life on the field of battle. The cost of freedom is not free and only the very few are willing to serve in harm’s way to protect, defend and assure the freedom so many take for granted."_ _"That Sen. Maggie Hassan has chosen to endorse Thomas and support her campaign, by extension makes her complicit in the disrespect advocated under the guise of freedom of expression, a right made sacrosanct by the blood of our fallen heroes and not the pettiness of those who believe that dishonoring our nation is a proper way to call attention to the injustice and racial prejudice that regrettably continues."_ _"As my mother often said, I will tell you what you are by the friends you associate with. In supporting Thomas, Hassan has chosen poorly and, more importantly, it is demonstrative of her political alignment with those who seek to destroy the very values that made America great."_ [**Read the Full Op-ed**](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0SwcUhno1XrCiXXuOQrcPZz4ExT2bWfCvAeigCCc9A7KuYaI498X469-2FGoDAxI02SFf4UCCjpZoYbxw0FRMIKq1PXdVTxYYIlOOLTR3dRowCrp7bzSOhoucrGAJVnoDBX3nGNSF4s4U1Yrb8SJLwrNcsnvOPcv4ONAx1agsXDeVwl6ngWQ6Eq-2BVqn1A1O-2Fsvcy-2FWKynutv0cl8-2FbeHTOG8sc-3DffIZ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgzzRhEeBCxzfLf2ZzOEJ6KG70kf-2B7fgkQ-2Brpwwq1Oa077cbGbXketR9057WP932xujUN8MKBeL-2BCufrP3y7UDmu74Nz2E88edxTIEmf0HnA9l1waAJGi8WdDofgbSN6Ow7FiuqYkuf-2BmHEd-2BkXVXie4pCT33DsFv-2BosfDGzTy8Y8thzLGCHLUPDf6LzxmrVWZIiV9NZ-2Fkz-2Bfyq-2FJ-2BZL7RwE1J-2BrSKQ2kFlZNoKnM-2Bm-2F30qEHt3OUdknFt6J-2F-2Bo-2B2O2-2FG6b-2BOZ6RKAQ4Ome7B2fgXYXeLjdNSL365NY23l-2BZWc8OYjy2WTXLkep-2B3689b5twYG3QQV3jkLLTu35U6yD9XMVbqQbANYSJJLkSgDWgXCXh2kCgI1E2ZDeSECNkAJUM7c4Xr3-2FDuZxR2-2F65f3Hoq8-2F0Q9mZvoM1EEd79cU0g-3D-3D) [](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S2ukhJHx8cIG8lYeuFBh7R0-3DT3ne_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgzzRhEeBCxzfLf2ZzOEJ6KG70kf-2B7fgkQ-2Brpwwq1Oa077cbGbXketR9057WP932xujUN8MKBeL-2BCufrP3y7UDmu74Nz2E88edxTIEmf0HnA9l1waAJGi8WdDofgbSN6Ow7FiuqYkuf-2BmHEd-2BkXVXie4pCT33DsFv-2BosfDGzTy8Y8thzLGCHLUPDf6LzxmrVWZIiV9NZ-2Fkz-2Bfyq-2FJ-2BZL7RwE1J-2BrSKQ2kFlZNoKnM-2Bm-2F01KpGsDlH-2FWPapv0nTrVFap-2Fl57wWtzUIWHXpdA1HU4Ep9lBBZIPSSLGVDyR2BC2y-2FIVN5sDsrDqGrPVd01Jm8aAWdkhK1E8LgF4dOO0-2BHNpxvhiFDB9OZ-2BoXLoK7Xvy4-2BUlLBs-2F-2BK65j1AJh5jR7od-2FPTMDirWQdkg7pW1KjreL-2FjM8WbILZGrA5cVZ-2FyxHg-3D-3D)

In supporting Thomas, Hassan has chosen poorly and, more importantly, it is demonstrative of her political alignment with those who seek to destroy the very values that made America great." | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m running
body:
I’m officially running to represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate, and I can’t do it without your help. | | | Peter, So. Big news. **I’m officially running to represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate.** Today is important. We need to show as much momentum as possible in the first 24 hours, and how much money we raise is a big part of that. I have to ask... [Can you donate to our campaign to be among our first supporters on the *first official day* of our launch?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxicRhsDReZU4BC6yRY0wHyh37Owke7WwD3mGosPrOffXjG63dwZOL3YhzjHhAxPBzoqKhxl1qFM0MOQoYEQO3A0W2GgY2hLNXOu4Q9jebvthHAT5PuPmM42Xvwj48Utzuf_LspA19MJ0GMhkrgR7_0Y2Ol__OzcqUoel5bbbsKrax14jCZ3pOx4dc5RoV8DfQtsIm9zc_upj9pAVTR0b3oTkVVj-KZARAG95kZ2KJypAaEjdNYFDP69NsiXo4ERDePbYXK0vuuWado5i_T485tvOTtfMNGWQxC7i3Xrq1h2Ip/399/Obxrn11mTVKzyHz4tDf-LQ/h0/SuLtoybFCXve6-fXg8i5keG1z0CMNtjIpSL1tNPvN_0) 👇
**[Contribute](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxicRhsDReZU4BC6yRY0wHyh37Owke7WwD3mGosPrOffXj8mzQur-YCHQJ8zjsHJZ6KDpchosAL708wkGgksMXHUHub0fJs4zzxP0ugBigYKnhpg4FFw7v_RsDfQtQQSqVUaBMW0xo_foS6l6fIcyd9WDKod67yRLnvmqgdBLaxR0rxhWmb1eYhgPvOcJI73Z8IkUZvu5XwzOO3SWPSqSXlUC_Bpwy70mhNz3FXVEUcuiuC8UwXSbOhLZ1hRkUk3dHOr1HopxoErr7eX85Ma4A6ejV8Wi1ZvKBxVg2RoKG1dkA/399/Obxrn11mTVKzyHz4tDf-LQ/h1/MWEo8-eMgSNR2q2Acl_i1jECwtoaatZPuqUNzaaPsnE)** The campaign we build together is gonna be special and it’s gonna be big. All 67 counties. Every vote matters. No one taken for granted. **You know I will say on the campaign what I believe to be true.** Always have. I’ve fought for the same things for the last 20 years, as Mayor of Braddock + now as Lieutenant Governor. I haven’t had to "evolve" over time on the issues. **No to:** Special interests, inequality, injustice, corporate control, hacky partisan political maneuvering. **Yes to:** Legal weed ✅, universal health care, LGBTQIA+ protection under law 🌈, the union way of life, second chances 🙏, racial justice, ending COVID 😷, raising the minimum wage, beating climate change. Oh yeah, and Sheetz. _Always Sheetz._ [__](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxicRhsDReZU4BC6yRY0wHyh37Owke7WwD3mGosPrOffXjyxJDYkHA41kpTY-ryxm8-QOctgBdgh-EGVNyE11_-glmx4cJj6M9aqUq7teqhThBiMEsYwABT9LStzx_St7wgnUqAawrozTm6hqFW4xpqlJSsFLhHX6AGAOdLzIcaFn5elp_Ct72H4UtGnF4WcZCgzay_C3Wp9QiEPufkfz382fbymhDbVZZepFSd40NWgTFLEA-N2nqppBbcArTWr378KeYA4ZjcL31Lcckfj7KRMxLQRMY_t8V1tII0Rpxxi3_/399/Obxrn11mTVKzyHz4tDf-LQ/h2/F0aprFXGyyODEUqZ_Ga5XpTyzegYIvRFfnftWfbaDSk) [Today is launch day. We need to raise a lot of money in our first 24 hours to show momentum. Can you be one of the first to chip in today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxicRhsDReZU4BC6yRY0wHyh37Owke7WwD3mGosPrOffXjeXAYahCdNZNfBFKR-BJ8IJyb2dgW9o0RExGD8dYwCsgx53lIeOeFxcVv5C_lcyn_brqdQQ3Nf0GvPg_QEAQOivEgkGCxEC1LarETCt4vyyw2ZX7RCAEPjMGT1BnqsaDREMRCLz2CQdgJqUNiG4fd0rcRksshG-Rsk0H2RWReLuoYbeywscvue_Ab8Ef5VGaFNH2QJNdatpTDLMv1qVjGqgkPfUVGbQr1bWDaIbV9zxeGMKiJZgiQpE7RDd2Rs3G-/399/Obxrn11mTVKzyHz4tDf-LQ/h3/WOIy0FPJ5IfCTjRXKXHg-XuolEzVxq9T7So_qadOYVg) Look, I fight like hell for Pennsylvania, and I *always* have. When state law banned marriage equality, I officiated one of the first gay marriages in Pennsylvania. When Braddock was overlooked + counted out, I made sure our community was heard. When the Pennsylvania GOP sent the flag police to take down my weed + pride flags from the state capitol, I put them back up. Aaaand.... When the people of Pennsylvania demanded a Gritty statue made of butter, I got them a Gritty statue made of butter. 😆 [So, can you chip in right now to support our campaign on day one? What we raise in the first 24 hours is going to set the tone for this campaign momentum-wise.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxicRhsDReZU4BC6yRY0wHyh37Owke7WwD3mGosPrOffXjX3Xa6-2Cy5P1pHFEHubABa5jRF3iFevbUNG68mb87qDDTpXZtlHeu3Uu6gTOBbJbYrNqA8F9heKFswnKNOVNgvROd2fAZZeR-T2cZliE5gBGx-tSVyGdVIe1cuKsNvtfpKIY6JWRduZu2amYZpc5BIwsOsvu2fetIyBqevYNFjHstxpeZRIas28XACcrEJkCCIPLPAwMB-vi5kekE8DXWwNm1VxoEOWmFZ8mqGdCTTIpBTFtBJcvCRla8uPS_85G/399/Obxrn11mTVKzyHz4tDf-LQ/h4/qXtABktaXtjAq-wkmBSmve-nCVaFc36-rHO4yPJLvQk) Gisele and I are humbled, overwhelmed, and *thankful* beyond words for your support so far. Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!! 💯 Let’s do this thing. John

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019eu05fOjHE6neQimlozErO59ux7as2EYPUrZBpwEXmElzNP6FqwGTy8FaIY01E4iLPOEIFf83zDd_UiiqpWq5qo2SW8nrV2rQSY_MVba2W52G8zRtMs9KziHm961JD-2VgGn7gSPLEw=&c=QuqLdcbBFRH8uC5EmbKDleMGFAG6c6xP35qcW461vVQeJP1nQhfqbA==&ch=PjZBoguMNSOqruDat_jKFXQ733zBwj42MbjLO__kuLMoUstFnHPhUg==).

subject: Cheney: Stand up to the Left’s policies, retake the House in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming
body:
Liz detailed why conservatives need to stand together in defense of our Constitution and the timeless values that make America so exceptional

Friend,
Yesterday on Fox News, Liz detailed why conservatives need to stand together in defense of our Constitution and the timeless values that make America so exceptional.

Liz made clear that the GOP must be the party of truth, the party of responsibility, and the party entrusted to handle the major challenges this nation faces.

clean_body: Right now Michelle needs your help -- it's urgent. ** . == FIRST: The Democrats spent $11,000,000.00 against us, outspending us 3:1. THEN: We defeated our Far Left opponent and flipped this seat from BLUE to RED. NOW: Our opponent is preparing for a rematch and we remain a top-target. AND:** The Democrats have already launched their first major campaign against us. Friend, our next election is about more than just defending this seat. It's about winning back the House for Republicans -- and we can't do that without winning this seat. == | == == == Harley Rouda has already declared a rematch and the millions spent against us will pale in comparison to the cash flood coming. The Democrats are already organizing against us, filling their coffers, and lining their pockets with cash to ensure they can come after us with everything they've got. Michelle is no stranger to a challenge. She watched her single-mother's small business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill. An immigrant, she lacked the resources to fight it. Since then, Michelle has dedicated her life to advocating for taxpayers, lowering taxes, and fighting against new taxes. She even led the charge to return over $400 million to California taxpayers. In Congress, she will continue to fight for hardworking Americans. But right now, she needs your help. == We defied the odds and defeated Pelosi's candidate because of our grassroots team. We'll only win again with your support. Thank you, Steph Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

clean_body: Actions speak louder than words and by signing 40 executive actions after assuming office, Joe Biden has sent all of us a message. == Actions speak louder than words and by signing 40 executive actions after assuming office, Joe Biden has sent all of us a message. Rather than focus on the needs of American families, Biden's agenda will focus on climate change and illegal immigrants' needs. After killing thousands of jobs by halting the Keystone Pipeline and halting construction of the border wall, Biden has made it clear during his first few weeks in office that he is going to be led by AOC, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi. One thing is clear; the Republican Party must take back the Senate Majority at all costs! == Without the Senate Majority, American workers will continue to take a back seat to liberal ideology. There is no telling what radical the Left will do next. Will you stand with the Republican Party today and join our fight to take back the Senate? == == == == == Thank you for your support, Senator John Barrasso (R-WY) PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOHN BARRASSO | | Friends of John Barrasso | P.O. Box 52008, Casper, WY 82605 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

**Peter , I know you’re tired of Washington politicians who have a lot to say but never make the time to listen to the people.**

_**Did you hear about the Biden Administration's newest COVID-19 relief package, which focuses on bailing out Blue States that have failed to manage their own budgets?**_
Ashley strongly opposes this measure because, instead of focusing on unemployment benefits for people who have lost their jobs due to the pandemic, this relief package uses hardworking taxpayer dollars to bail out blue states like New York, California, and Illinois, that have mismanaged their funds.
[_**Will you chip in to help Ashley fight back against Blue State bailouts?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ADFnqEy0w3ZBtSjLE-RK-nBYw8jO0YKS7Tg36Eqh7IFWsaLldHuiqYF-y6P1rE60MA2cyLnNZedTUTTYiOtVAtZldulNwpLqoQe_oLHA1-pq00l9QRSj9MOaZydOb5QNJHyKI04PRZDOM6ovGWtsfkZCWsaOxiDTMnh9Ov06WRXB-q7uaJWQmY2t7JpjwhnSzYr1pNh6R0qsFhVbX2ntd-27h2dqfTMyEsDqvlXy5Fem7l5MAq1naSYKLRI2JKBDqhMud1T5vVa-2rPiay1lc7q4OB2d-HfIVzEVXs_h1e-pjHuhe59d0gVyDApEIT7HtGsQFKBOgPWuRQLSMaY6mR0neQW6IBFvBwOLZUxGWdX-IS1y8SLSin8qp23o67GAzYjP2hkLiO48QoDPy5aRNjdAxLD3eoBiCvcM5cUxGAHEFlrlySo5ihvQ-FeW6KMZXG5luzRFTqWMFc8czbj7nw==&c=ZHwijYacRHDRLtw8Oga0Po9yzaxyNE73qRi9X_p2VZhBaJordOBPow==&ch=1BvB6pIXtM_bQd86hsxQoY-PyV8xfKQb7tqdQCTdu7IXPG_44g0aYQ==)
[Yes >>> Stand against the bailouts!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ADFnqEy0w3ZBtSjLE-RK-nBYw8jO0YKS7Tg36Eqh7IFWsaLldHuiqYF-y6P1rE60MA2cyLnNZedTUTTYiOtVAtZldulNwpLqoQe_oLHA1-pq00l9QRSj9MOaZydOb5QNJHyKI04PRZDOM6ovGWtsfkZCWsaOxiDTMnh9Ov06WRXB-q7uaJWQmY2t7JpjwhnSzYr1pNh6R0qsFhVbX2ntd-27h2dqfTMyEsDqvlXy5Fem7l5MAq1naSYKLRI2JKBDqhMud1T5vVa-2rPiay1lc7q4OB2d-HfIVzEVXs_h1e-pjHuhe59d0gVyDApEIT7HtGsQFKBOgPWuRQLSMaY6mR0neQW6IBFvBwOLZUxGWdX-IS1y8SLSin8qp23o67GAzYjP2hkLiO48QoDPy5aRNjdAxLD3eoBiCvcM5cUxGAHEFlrlySo5ihvQ-FeW6KMZXG5luzRFTqWMFc8czbj7nw==&c=ZHwijYacRHDRLtw8Oga0Po9yzaxyNE73qRi9X_p2VZhBaJordOBPow==&ch=1BvB6pIXtM_bQd86hsxQoY-PyV8xfKQb7tqdQCTdu7IXPG_44g0aYQ==)
Iowa has always managed to balance its budget, so why should taxpayers in Iowa foot the bill for mistakes made in states like New York and California? **The answer is:_they shouldn 't_**.

clean_body: Look what he's trying to do now... &zwnj == == | == Friend, Did you hear about the Biden Administration's newest COVID-19 relief package, which focuses on bailing out Blue States that have failed to manage their own budgets? Ashley strongly opposes this measure because, instead of focusing on unemployment benefits for people who have lost their jobs due to the pandemic, this relief package uses hardworking taxpayer dollars to bail out blue states like New York, California, and Illinois, that have mismanaged their funds. == == Iowa has always managed to balance its budget, so why should taxpayers in Iowa foot the bill for mistakes made in states like New York and California? The answer is:they shouldn 't. Ashley ran for Congress to bring some Iowa Common Sense back to Washington and stick up for Iowa taxpayers like you, Friend. So she will do everything in her power to make sure Congress does not move forward with these Blue State bailouts! == == == == == == == If this package is passed, states like New York and California will continue to expect hardworking Iowans and taxpayers across the country to bail them out for their own mistakes. We cannot set this precedent, Friend. == Thank you, Team Hinson == PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Moms for Democracy
subject: Moms know that actions have consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms in Office
body:
Peter,
Just over a month ago, the former occupant of the White House held a rally and sent his followers to the Capital in an attempt to overturn the results of a free and fair election. What happened that day was appalling and anti-democratic. All of us at Moms in Office **stand against those who would use violence to remain in power** , as well as the underlying white supremacist and anti-Semitic currents of the insurrectionists.
This week, as the impeachment trial kicks off in the US Senate, we want to reiterate that we are diametrically opposed to the group that hosted that rally - and it infuriates us that it was a group seeking to leverage the power of moms. Those of us who are fighting to make our country more representative and more equitable are not part of the Republican "Moms for America" group that hosted a Congresswoman praising Hitler and incited the actions of January 6th.**No, we are moms for Americans, fighting for a seat at the table and for policies that will help all families. **
As moms, we know that we must teach our children that actions have consequences. We teach them that out of love. And **we love our country** as well - that is why the actions of January 6th must be brought into the light and there must be consequences for all those involved, including the disgraceful man who "led" this country for four years. We encourage the Senate to vote to convict and bar him from holding future office.
Keep fighting the good fight,
Simona and Elisa

body:

| Peter,
After pushing unfounded, nonsense claims about the Russia hoax for months, Congressional Democrats have suddenly changed their tune by denouncing and censoring a freshman lawmaker who received the vote of 75% of her constituents.
This isn't just blatant hypocrisy - it also sets the dangerous precedent of the D.C. Swamp supplanting its own will over that of the American people.

| In the span of just a week, Establishment Republicans decided behind closed doors to keep the America-last leadership of Liz Cheney, while Democrats worked to remove a duly-elected representative from her committees.
These decisions, made possible by disillusioned RINOs, not only reinforce the disconnect between Washington and everyday America - [but they also make it clear that Democrats will walk all over us unless we stop playing their game and actually get tough.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010cvm0g_GBJiNUweBfCqeeo0-Q---EwRWenTbpm5X9m_5EuFoozdJ-I6-2qezEEw6ZfAIuLB5LFgYPCN8LDvo8IWGRbahzGZE8qo6BDvk7J62AZ9Uxxo96sDXWDI8qakzFKGyBmbSxiseWPrrXtKNDN75k1I-exDSin_qJMWSTF3mrlYXnVFghA==&c=iIlrvFVURea3zQSnuwnKsq-xL0Weo3w49fOBvBWY9ulTMyALMjk9fA==&ch=YIuZe_ZYpsyFfOoUewz6HzSeiSF6TAA6KdjCu9H-nhUuFwTsq-_9NA==)
Instances like this are why I'm fighting for the changes we need to make in BOTH parties in order for the will of voters to be respected - and unlike other fake Republicans, I'm in this fight to WIN!

name: Team Marco
subject: Reopen Schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
_**" Not one penny money should go to schools that are not getting kids back in the classroom."**_
-Senator Marco Rubio Friend,

Doctors, nurses, firefighters, police officers, garbage men, cashiers at grocery stores, letter carriers & Florida teachers are _**WORKING**_.

_**BILLIONS**_ in COVID funds have been approved to help get teachers and students across the country back into the classroom.

_**Despite the massive funding and scientific evidence that it is safe for kids to be back in school, Teachers ' Unions are saying NO!**_

Children are falling further and further behind the longer they are out of school. Not only are many floundering academically, but socially and emotionally as well.

For months, we have been talking about the need to get kids back to the classroom. We've allocated BILLIONS to do it safely. Teachers are getting vaccinated. But now, none of that is good enough for these Teachers' Unions, who refuse to allow teachers and students back to the classroom. While these Teachers' Unions continue the gridlock, it's our children who suffer.

We can not let this go on any longer. **SHOULD RELIEF FUNDS BE WITHHELD FROM SCHOOLS WHO REFUSE TO REOPEN?**

clean_body: " Not one penny money should go to schools that are not getting kids back in the classroom." -Senator Marco Rubio Friend, Doctors, nurses, firefighters, police officers, garbage men, cashiers at grocery stores, letter carriers & Florida teachers are WORKING. BILLIONS in COVID funds have been approved to help get teachers and students across the country back into the classroom. Despite the massive funding and scientific evidence that it is safe for kids to be back in school, Teachers ' Unions are saying NO! Children are falling further and further behind the longer they are out of school. Not only are many floundering academically, but socially and emotionally as well. For months, we have been talking about the need to get kids back to the classroom. We've allocated BILLIONS to do it safely. Teachers are getting vaccinated. But now, none of that is good enough for these Teachers' Unions, who refuse to allow teachers and students back to the classroom. While these Teachers' Unions continue the gridlock, it's our children who suffer. We can not let this go on any longer. SHOULD RELIEF FUNDS BE WITHHELD FROM SCHOOLS WHO REFUSE TO REOPEN? Peter,

_Did you know over _70%_ of Americans support _Term Limits_ on Congress?! _

That means that this should be an easy and bipartisan bill that we could quickly accomplish. Unfortunately, a handful of powerful Washington insiders have held up the passage of term limits for decades.

**There are even politicians who started serving in their 20s that are STILL working in politics at almost 80 years old!**

**That’s 60 YEARS on the taxpayers’ dime!**

Congress was never supposed to be a lifelong career; it was about having the honor of faithfully serving your country and advocating for the people of your community.

_**That’s why I made Term Limits one of my top campaign promises when I was running for Congress!**_

It’s time for us to stand up to put an end to the revolving door of career and corrupt politicians who use Congress to enrich themselves while their constituents suffer! _**[It’s time to Demand Congressional Term Limits; add your name now!](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=2414d83bde444de59afafedc8db12e29&_e=85eJJCSh5nP3Dj-u-WocmbqybOnqiM30_dS3-9EAPhj7VUQkkZuCA6hlOIvzHGnKvX-P1BW4_Y9jwScYk4lQ9MiZK75iu0dlLLdbQzUeD9QPWCxSm3TU3w-ifUoxzsnjw46X8Gf7jHaCvEsohwKAy0zJ1D8evtC9FpJ2eQmWETa3OnNPQxbS9NfG8krV942bBQP_m2FMPp0Ut8-zaKJDvvR6siuVWk92g7_cmKawJqNAVuAk7Om3a8hqI6UoHAkgi-HAcSIHCdSzRB1bUX9cQGSy-JESG_CEVZePPL47ASEA0okn5RZ8G3Lnxn4pirL_YNyCtbMIaNRT5R0iMCRJuk5mPhCIMZHjxm-vMkosH9lNy7XHAKFlbN4zs4orA5riBOFY5d0QbSKtd3s5qbatKZobkyKbDGjBJt3aG2aeCOPHO0-RhRBp_SeeyN5CYujQFmOhZ6HDlrCq2-A4Ast81kCKQwFg9Gtv2rYtg6BHG8t19z1crD1nuA_T4WQpOMeMtW7xvqSdDR6PzProG55v4A%3D%3D)**_

clean_body: It’s time for us to put an end to the revolving door of career politicians who use Congress to enrich themselves while their constituents suffer... 📋 Sign Our Term Limits Petition 📋 | | | Peter, Did you know over 70% of Americans support Term Limits on Congress?! That means that this should be an easy and bipartisan bill that we could quickly accomplish. Unfortunately, a handful of powerful Washington insiders have held up the passage of term limits for decades. There are even politicians who started serving in their 20s that are STILL working in politics at almost 80 years old! That’s 60 YEARS on the taxpayers’ dime! Congress was never supposed to be a lifelong career; it was about having the honor of faithfully serving your country and advocating for the people of your community. That’s why I made Term Limits one of my top campaign promises when I was running for Congress! It’s time for us to stand up to put an end to the revolving door of career and corrupt politicians who use Congress to enrich themselves while their constituents suffer! | 📋 Demand Term Limits Petition 📋 Email: Signature: MISSING | Peter, I fight every day to represent Long Island communities faithfully, and that’s why I support term limits. But I know that I can’t do it by myself forever. I hope you'll join me today to demand term limits and force out the career politicians and Washington insiders! Use this personalized link to sign my Demand Term Limits petition: Thanks, Andrew Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for Solyndra Records of President Biden’s Chief of Staff Ron Klain
body:
Judicial Watch requested records from the time period of January 20, 2009, to January 1, 2011, when Klain was chief of staff to then-Vice President Biden.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 08, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52856&L=22068&F=H&) | **[U.S. to Reopen $300 Million Facility as Overflow Shelter for Influx of Illegal Immigrant Youths](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52856&L=22068&F=H&)** An increase in illegal immigrant minors crossing into the United States from Mexico is evidently forcing the government to reopen a costly and short-lived residential shelter as an overflow facility. With a capacity of about 1,300, the camp is situated in the remote southwest Texas town of Carrizo Springs just 45 miles from the Mexican border. Agency That Oversees Nuclear Labs Fails to Revoke Former Employees’ Security Clearance](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52856&L=22030&F=H&)** The government agency that oversees the nation’s nuclear laboratories and the highly classified material they house often does not revoke the security clearance of employees and contractors after they leave, potentially compromising national security. The failure involves the Department of Energy (DOE), which issues the authorization via Personal Identity Verification (PIV) cards that serve as entry badges indicating the level of access to classified matter or special nuclear material. PIV cards also allow employees to enter, occupy or leave DOE sites and facilities. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52856&L=22030&F=H&)

With a capacity of about 1,300, the camp is situated in the remote southwest Texas town of Carrizo Springs just 45 miles from the Mexican border. ---|--- | | | | | In 2011, internal emails reportedly uncovered by investigators for the House Energy and Commerce Committee show the Obama administration was monitoring the progress of the $535 million taxpayer loan, “even as analysts were voicing serious concerns about the risk involved.” ---|--- | | | | | The government agency that oversees the nation’s nuclear laboratories and the highly classified material they house often does not revoke the security clearance of employees and contractors after they leave, potentially compromising national security. The failure involves the Department of Energy (DOE), which issues the authorization via Personal Identity Verification (PIV) cards that serve as entry badges indicating the level of access to classified matter or special nuclear material. PIV cards also allow employees to enter, occupy or leave DOE sites and facilities. ---|--- | | | | | The appeal is challenging the Superior Court of Delaware’s January 4, 2021, ruling upholding the Delaware state attorney general’s opinion that the records are not “public records” because, the opinion concludes without evidence, no public funds are used to support the Biden records project at the University of Delaware. ---|--- | | | Breitbart The false narrative that Democrats concocted to hobble the Trump administration four years ago is now the real deal with Joe Biden and his family. And unlike President Trump, who faced unprecedented institutional resistance and Deep State resistance, President Biden can likely count on the Justice Department and the media to allow him to escape meaningful scrutiny. Newsmax The veteran lawmaker, Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse, D-R.I., says the conservative student organization, Turning Point USA, should lose its nonprofit rating because it held large events that could help spread COVID-19. == The Daily Caller “We have no idea why the University of Delaware is hiding these materials that the public should have every right to see and we are grateful for Judicial Watch and our local counsel for pushing this case hard,” DCNF President Neil Patel said. “When people ask why our institutions are no longer trusted, they should look up this case.” == = = == == = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: João is running for Senate
body:
We’re building our campaign as a family. | | | Hey, Peter — it's Gisele. I wanted to take a quick sec to tell you if you hadn’t heard already: **Today João — most of you know him as John — announced that he is officially running for Senate, and we need your help to make this first 24 hours big!** **_[Can you make a donation to help send John to the U.S. Senate? This is Day One of our campaign, and any amount you’re able to pitch in has a huge impact in showing our momentum in the first 24 hours.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxiYH1ID8cEJQFAKZ5UNqU5MXlnyBOIujn7tvtK-SHifo8Jcko7LXYFI7eeTnxC8mV6ne2m1D1-MfBqj31qVa7iopIcxMa-IFk8oCv7ELVpUR_sTUZAPSKa3Owk9jE0mU4P_2ceeQS06p0vrbbzTpYmBy8XBbAVbw70gYZLPafU_Z7XDgf5M7mKxStbAict4ueJOoam9rRb5XYij_ngQOxf41wL0MBjJiPOv1s1BfA0oBvPQNAI_D-lRE3OrPobHgBq4lGwV66YuX5svi757HYw8iYT8mAKbJTwIMIPLoxxfPX/399/HB82CbuPSl2_LzzrANDgDQ/h0/9TG8_4NFMcgqm0N1Jg_jS1ofRGkM450ZFFFqDea1iPg)_** [Contribute](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxiYH1ID8cEJQFAKZ5UNqU5MXlnyBOIujn7tvtK-SHifo85-DMkoYgEZ-uaThjmdxadKVykOW_y3BH4YmsTmbV-wshkCo2gcoPwD_B9RELBhDs-odUrg5We0b6rXDL027j9-3W6As7ZHfZ3GM3EUdpU9rirBn-ImKdvs8WdG_c8aowGtENfjp1wg796vEh6zPt5shCZ3ihbBfExS-REZB_MwbEDaJckJ4ozdjK5iFSgwfhJjYDwhOrKkW-AF_b4hQsduoiDV6QNHT7mzM2St3MbK9SkEw8RYSuCm8tniniBpxv/399/HB82CbuPSl2_LzzrANDgDQ/h1/qvAgIGJ1ictp7wLD5Y8io3OTEeJsZCIp1mV2fOvSZfI) João has dedicated his life to fighting inequality in our beautiful state of Pennsylvania. **I know my husband will bring that fight to the United States Senate, even if he insists on wearing shorts year-round.** I first met João when he was Mayor of Braddock. I came to visit and learn about the community. Then, he fell MADLY in love with me. This wonderful community was overlooked and counted out, but João helped create jobs and got young people engaged. The program he helped enact has graduated GEDs for well over 1,000 young people. Under his leadership, we created a community center, urban gardens, amenities, and opportunities. Even a free store and women’s incubator space that I still run to this day. João and I are like hammers on the things we care about, and the things _you_ care about, whether it’s criminal justice reform, racial justice, immigrants’ rights, legalizing weed, or LGBTQIA+ protections. **We want to show our kids that these are things worth fighting for.** **_[I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important: Can you please donate to our campaign? The earlier we build a broad base of support, the better our chances at electing John. We are thankful beyond words for your support.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxiYH1ID8cEJQFAKZ5UNqU5MXlnyBOIujn7tvtK-SHifo8bNUg4Nn5UASAoI8OoLxRpJOU6a9kcJ-Gg8YG1h1Z3iHYwsA8H59wDTIpI1Ca3-FX4JOCUfowBse4L6qEOPZUMJlzVbw-IoulDjZAKZ5G1-fsZVtsiz6iIUg8R1eWStfIbXX3OZ5URPpti7TFXDhEgQt4Kib95ftSa2IvDgtnuJwkBQNDCzJ2nSvsz2hAfHDSMbAz1T4IV3wb9-uD8pyUVpeokl-KI8JwAO6B9PifEDzGPgYP07clxnr3nEKvIpzW/399/HB82CbuPSl2_LzzrANDgDQ/h2/fsmcrLQemqHOsBB42xV4Tf0eVaVdzr4fHrumf2N2UdU)_** And while I do rag on João 99% of the time... He’s the best person I know. 🥰 (But I would never admit this to his face, and if he read this email I’d say I was hacked). With love, Gisele ❤️ Gisele Barreto Fetterman
SLOP
Second Lady of Pennsylvania [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOsEpEbIMvY6QCovvAwhuDZ5mVY5Zz4Ps9-foEHWlxiYH1ID8cEJQFAKZ5UNqU5MXlnyBOIujn7tvtK-SHifo86pVfLXbF9FEIQXnUqlMb4koMEAb7ohDvePLKzA_QWAq2M_iqPVu1S46MgS5Xb_ypmpm4T9ZLfq4_scnROold0oRMS1AoSIC8PXfOCGsIIfFhM3XMzz2f3buLMzdwkkme58Vqqc2o-ZSIRKgaolY0CWl_xf_uBiLtMKizfjQohtqvk1M_dADKjl09Yel5I4Pc9Js_Sy9kb6eSV6wNWOLgpVn75KHbzkt2Vy7PmnaDGYTw40cfFFctuSKszAIoLTuF/399/HB82CbuPSl2_LzzrANDgDQ/h3/hG4nmdMXvjcEAPyCkTHeYxGd0YmcCm9LWjXnCbwL4LU)

body:
Friends, It’s been five weeks since I was sworn into office and I’m extremely proud of what we’ve accomplished so far.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRGVtYWlsJTJCbG9nbyUyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW0lM0RhcHBlYWwlMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0RFYXJseSUyQlN1Y2Nlc3NlcyUyQkVtYWls&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8694)

| | Friends-

It’s been five weeks since I was sworn into office and I’m extremely proud of what we’ve accomplished so far.

When the [Biden Administration planned to give COVID vaccines to terrorists](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkZtYWxsaW90YWtpcy1jb3ZpZC12YWNjaW5lcy1mb3ItOS0xMS10ZXJyb3Jpc3QtYmVmb3JlLWNpdGl6ZW5zLWlzLWJhY2t3YXJkcyUyRiUzRnV0bV9zb3VyY2UlM0RlbWFpbCUyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW0lM0RhcHBlYWwlMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0RFYXJseSUyQlN1Y2Nlc3NlcyUyQkVtYWls&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8695) held in Guantanamo Bay, including 9/11 mastermind Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, I led the fight to make sure they wouldn’t be given priority over American citizens. Just hours later, the Biden Administration relented and this gross injustice was prevented.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkZtYWxsaW90YWtpcy1jb3ZpZC12YWNjaW5lcy1mb3ItOS0xMS10ZXJyb3Jpc3QtYmVmb3JlLWNpdGl6ZW5zLWlzLWJhY2t3YXJkcyUyRiUzRnV0bV9zb3VyY2UlM0RlbWFpbCUyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW0lM0RhcHBlYWwlMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0RFYXJseSUyQlN1Y2Nlc3NlcyUyQkVtYWls&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8695)
---
| | |
---
| | The pandemic has devastated our restaurants and taverns, with more than 100,000 closed and 2.1 million employees out of work. It’s been even worse in New York City because Governor Cuomo and Mayor de Blasio have [unfairly kept our restaurants closed](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkZtYWxsaW90YWtpcy1ueWMtcmVzdGF1cmFudHMtY29udGludWUtdG8tYmUtZGlzY3JpbWluYXRlZC1hZ2FpbnN0LWJ5LWN1b21vJTJGJTNGdXRtX3NvdXJjZSUzRGVtYWlsJTI2dXRtX21lZGl1bSUzRGFwcGVhbCUyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbiUzREVhcmx5JTJCU3VjY2Vzc2VzJTJCRW1haWw=&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8696) while indoor dining has been allowed Upstate and on Long Island.

We called them out for the harm they were doing and they’re finally letting our restaurants open up their doors this week.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkZtYWxsaW90YWtpcy1ueWMtcmVzdGF1cmFudHMtY29udGludWUtdG8tYmUtZGlzY3JpbWluYXRlZC1hZ2FpbnN0LWJ5LWN1b21vJTJGJTNGdXRtX3NvdXJjZSUzRGVtYWlsJTI2dXRtX21lZGl1bSUzRGFwcGVhbCUyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbiUzREVhcmx5JTJCU3VjY2Vzc2VzJTJCRW1haWw=&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8696)
---
| | |
---
| | [Governor Cuomo’s nursing home scandal](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8697) shattered the trust placed in him by New Yorkers. When the Governor’s decision requiring nursing homes to accept COVID-positive patients first came to light, I immediately called for an investigation.

Now, it’s finally been revealed that the Cuomo Administration undercounted COVID-related nursing home deaths by up to 50%.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8697)
---
| | |
---
| | Everybody knows that kids need to get back to school.

[When Governor Cuomo and Mayor de Blasio refused to reopen schools](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkZtYWxsaW90YWtpcy1yZW9wZW4tc2Nob29scy1vci1naXZlLXRheHBheWVycy1iYWNrLWZlZGVyYWwtZnVuZHMlMkYlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNEYXBwZWFsJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNERWFybHklMkJTdWNjZXNzZXMlMkJFbWFpbA==&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8698) or allow our children to compete in scholastic sports, I called on them to return the $4 billion in federal education aid New York received if they kept them closed. Now, elementary schools are open and middle school students will be back in their classrooms soon.

I will continue fighting until every child is back in school.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkZtYWxsaW90YWtpcy1yZW9wZW4tc2Nob29scy1vci1naXZlLXRheHBheWVycy1iYWNrLWZlZGVyYWwtZnVuZHMlMkYlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNEYXBwZWFsJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNERWFybHklMkJTdWNjZXNzZXMlMkJFbWFpbA==&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=444A631A1A8698)

clean_body: Friends, It’s been five weeks since I was sworn into office and I’m extremely proud of what we’ve accomplished so far. | | | | | | Friends- It’s been five weeks since I was sworn into office and I’m extremely proud of what we’ve accomplished so far. When the held in Guantanamo Bay, including 9/11 mastermind Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, I led the fight to make sure they wouldn’t be given priority over American citizens. Just hours later, the Biden Administration relented and this gross injustice was prevented. | | | | | | | | | | The pandemic has devastated our restaurants and taverns, with more than 100,000 closed and 2.1 million employees out of work. It’s been even worse in New York City because Governor Cuomo and Mayor de Blasio have while indoor dining has been allowed Upstate and on Long Island. We called them out for the harm they were doing and they’re finally letting our restaurants open up their doors this week. | | | | | | | | | | shattered the trust placed in him by New Yorkers. When the Governor’s decision requiring nursing homes to accept COVID-positive patients first came to light, I immediately called for an investigation. Now, it’s finally been revealed that the Cuomo Administration undercounted COVID-related nursing home deaths by up to 50%. | | | | | | | | | | Everybody knows that kids need to get back to school. or allow our children to compete in scholastic sports, I called on them to return the $4 billion in federal education aid New York received if they kept them closed. Now, elementary schools are open and middle school students will be back in their classrooms soon. I will continue fighting until every child is back in school. | | | | | | | | | | I will keep working on the issues that are important to us, but I need your help. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Nicole | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Mask Mandate Bill Gets Hearing Tomorrow in Health Committee
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_ha&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **ALERT: The Health Finance & Policy Committee will be hearing the Mask Mandate Bill (HF604) on Tuesday at 3:00 PM.** As you may recall, last week a group of legislators [introduced a bill in the Minnesota House](https://www.action4liberty.com/legislators_introduce_mask_mandate_bill_in_mn_house?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_ha&n=2) that would make Governor Walz' mask mandate into permanent law. It would require you and me to wear a face covering anytime we are in a public building or business and it would fine us for noncompliance. Business owners who don't comply - well, they face up to 90 days of jail time. This bill just mirrors what Governor Walz decreed already last summer. But unlike his illegal, unconstitutional and unilateral dictate, this would codify things into law. It's becoming more clear by the day what these politicians really want - more power over us.
## What Can You Do?
**Rep John Huot will face a tough election in 2022 and is the Vice Chair of the Committee tomorrow. Tell him to STOP the Mask Mandate Bill, HF604. Governor Walz and the Legislature have no business forcing Minnesotans to cover their faces!** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=CaNtuHv5YBL_hDPpdi5djotQU4QDe7hF4Yl1mbydK857nIRjNKVUdokgyuzbLqqRQK1vP01bJa9eCNmI7ksS3A&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_ha&n=3)
## Rep John Huot
## Phone: 651-296-4306
## Email: ****[rep.john.huot@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.huot@house.mn)
Here are the [other members](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=CaNtuHv5YBL_hDPpdi5djotQU4QDe7hF4Yl1mbydK87phxPEzXTSoMHlVrdD7RAPNCdgRctl01UhhfFNgr-ddQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_ha&n=4) of the Committee
## We Are Holding Vulnerable Democrats Accountable
Action 4 Liberty just deployed a team up north into Reps Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard's districts. We hired a full time team of doorknockers and activists who will talk to every voter and find every supporter who shares our view to STOP the Mask Mandate Bill and End Walz' Emergency Powers for good. Our team will stand on street corners holding signs. They'll organize protests and build a larger activist footprint in their districts. And they'll meet with business owners impacted by Walz' orders and engage them in this fight. Temperatures in Hibbing this morning were -29, but that isn't stopping our team from getting out and talking with voters. They're just wearing an extra couple layers of clothing. We will continue taking our message directly to voters in these vulnerable Democrats' districts. They either get on board, kill the Mask Mandate Bill and End Walz' Emergency Powers, or we'll make sure they don't get re-elected in 2022! **If you're looking for other ways to help, consider contributing to our firewood fund. I never imagined I'd be asking people to pay for wood, but we need to keep our rental home well heated for our team. And the temps are dangerously cold this week.** **Help heat the home for a week with a[donation of $100. If that's too steep, $50 heats the home for 3-4 days. Want to help even more, consider a one time donation of $1,000 to help deploy another guy on the ground with lit pieces for a week!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_ha&n=5)** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_ha&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_ha&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_ha&n=8), software for leaders.
